mechanism_narrative: A rise in the GDP price index signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts supply and lifts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that boosts supply and lifts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in tightening labor periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the industrial production index signals a strengthening supply cycle that boosts demand and lifts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing starts rate signals a weakening demand cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in weakening demand periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the labor participation rate signals a tightening labor market that boosts supply and lifts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in tightening labor periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the retail sales index signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts supply and lifts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the industrial production index signals a strengthening supply cycle that boosts demand and lifts S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
